tools.name: screen_repository
tools.description: Screen a public GitHub repository or GitHub pull request URL and generate a GitLumen-style risk report. Supports repo URLs and /pull/<number> URLs.

tools.name: get_review_report
tools.description: Get a previously generated GitLumen MCP report by reportId.

tools.name: list_review_reports
tools.description: List previously generated GitLumen MCP reports stored locally.

tools.name: get_repository_structure
tools.description: Fetch public GitHub repository or PR structure without generating a full risk report.

tools.name: explain_gitlumen_mcp_flow
tools.description: Explain how this Path 1 MCP server fits into GitLumen and how it later connects to Base MCP Path 2.
